item.title: Version 1.1.1 — bug-fix release
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.1.1

Bug fixes for home stats, hands-free, and push-to-talk.

Fixes

  • Home stats from cloud DB. Weekly streak and 7-day WPM now read from the full cloud dataset, not the 200-row local cache.
  • Modifier-only hands-free fires instantly. No more 150 ms hold before Control+Command (or any modifier combo bound to hands-free) starts recording.
  • Push-to-talk no longer hangs after a mode switch. Pressing push-to-talk to stop hands-free used to silently break the key until a restart.
  • Double-tap to re-enter hands-free works every time. After stopping hands-free with a single tap, the next double-tap was being dropped.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon.

item.title: Version 1.1.0 — Richer mid-session mode switching
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.1.0

Better mid-session control, more configurable hotkeys, fewer false scolds.

New hotkey gestures

  • Latch mid-session: Hold your PTT key, then press your hands-free combo — recording continues, now in hands-free.
  • Double-tap modifier-only PTT: E.g. Control alone, now toggles hands-free. Used to only work on Fn.
  • Single-tap to stop hands-free: Press your PTT key once during an active session to stop and transcribe.
  • Extend the chord: Ctrl → Ctrl+Cmd during PTT promotes into hands-free. Works with any binding you configure.
  • Confirmation sound: A short "Pop" plays on mode flips so you always know what state you're in.

Fixes

  • Hotkeys attach at HID driver level — other dictation apps can't steal your keys.
  • Accidental short taps (<200 ms) no longer trigger the "No speech detected" warning.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon.

item.title: Version 1.0.0 — Speak 3x faster than you type. Anywhere on your Mac.
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.0.0

Speak 3x faster than you type. Anywhere on your Mac.

You speak at 140 words per minute. You type at 40. Abalone Flow closes that gap everywhere you'd normally type — Mail, Slack, Claude Code, Cursor, Obsidian, Linear, Notion.

Hold a key. Speak. Release. Your words land at the cursor, already punctuated and capitalized, before you've taken your hand off the key.

The five things that matter

  • Transcription runs on your Mac. OpenAI Whisper via WhisperKit, native on Apple Silicon. Audio never leaves your machine.
  • Your history syncs across devices. Transcribed text follows you from laptop to desktop; audio stays local.
  • One-click sign-in with Google. No forms, no email to verify, no inbox ceremony.
  • Free. No subscription, no credit card, no word limits today.
  • Near-perfect accuracy. ~97% on clean English. Swap in Large-v3 for broadcast-grade transcription.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon (M1, M2, M3, M4).
